original_image_tags: A faint, largely blank, or "show-through" page. The top third contains a blue ink received stamp. Below the stamp, faint, mirrored text (show-through from the reverse side of the page) is visible in two columns. The text appears to be a typed list, but is inverted and too faint to read clearly. The paper is aged, with horizontal ruled lines, a hole punch at the bottom center, and some minor tears and marks along the left edge.

elements.description: Faint, reversed typed text visible through the paper. Faint horizontal blue lines are visible across the page. A blue ink stamp at the top reads 'RECEIVED AUG 21 11 01 AM '51' INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. A torn hole punch is visible at the bottom center.

judge.reason: Description B provides specific, verbatim text for the blue ink stamp ('RECEIVED AUG 21 11 01 AM '51' INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE') which Description A does not read or claim to see clearly, creating a direct contradiction on the verbatim content of a key visual element.
